items.name: Veg Pakora
items.description: Homemade Mixed Vegetables, Battered with Chickpea Flour and Spices, Deep Fried and Served with Grilled Tomato Chutney. (Veg, Gf)

items.name: Sel Roti
items.description: Nepalese Style Sticky Rice Flour Donut (2) Served With Vegetable Curry And Pickle

items.name: Laphing (Dry or Wet)
items.description: Thin Flour Crepe Stuffed With Waiwai, Garlic, Herbs, Chili Paste Served With Red Pepper Chili, Coriander, Sesame, Spring Onion, Soya, Chili Oil. (Veg, Vegan, DF)

items.name: Manchurian
items.description: Sweet, Savory, and Chilly Garlic Spiced Semidried Delicious Gravy with Onion, Capsicum, and Coriander. (Veg, Vegan, DF)

items.name: Chatpate
items.description: Savory (Chat version) Dish Made with Puffed Rice, Veggies, Chili, Lemon Juice, Chickpea Crisps & Nuts (Veg, Vegan, Df)

items.name: Wai Wai Sadheko
items.description: Nepalese Famous Crispy Noodle Spiced Up with Herbs, Veggies, Cucumber, Chilly, Coriander, and Spices  (Veg, Vegan)

items.name: Puri Tarkari
items.description: Deep Fried Flat Wheat Bread Served with the Potato and Peas Curry & Side Pickle (Veg)

items.name: Sukuti Chatpate
items.description: Savory (Chat version) Dish Made with Puffed Rice, Veggies, Chili, Lemon Juice, Chickpea Crisps & Nuts in Addition with Buffalo Jerky (Veg, Gf)

items.name: Panipuri
items.description: Crispy Puffed Flour Balls; Balls with Spiced Potato Fillings and Savory, Herbed, Tamarind-Based Water Dip .(Veg,Vegan,Df )

items.name: Sausage
items.description: Fried Chicken Sausages with Spiced Potato Wedges and Tomato Dip. (GF)

items.name: Malai Chicken
items.description: Tender Chicken Pieces Cooked with Garlic, Cream, Cheese and Herbs. (GF)

items.name: Chicken Bites
items.description: Crispy Fried Chicken Bites Dusted with House Spice, Fried Onion, Cilantros and Side Sichuan Pepper (Timur) Aioli

items.name: Chicken Wings
items.description: Crispy Wings Served with Our Own House Spicy Peri Peri Marinade & Salad, Spiced Potato Wedges with Sichuan Pepper (Timur) Aioli. (Ask for Mild, Medium, or Hot) (GF)

items.name: Pork Belly
items.description: Charred Grilled Spice Marinaded Pork Belly, Served with Tomato Relish and Spiced House Potato Wedges. (GF)

items.name: Paneer Chilly
items.description: Stir Fry Cottage Cheese with Onion and Capsicum on Chili Sauce, Soy, Spices. (Veg, DF, GF)

items.name: Chana Aloo
items.description: Chickpea and Potato Curry Mixed with Homemade Spices

items.description: Double Cooked Potato, Coated with Spice, Herbs, Sesame and Peanuts (Can be Mild). (Veg, Vegan, DF, GF)

items.name: Samosa Chat / Samosa Tarkari
items.description: Lightly Crushed Somasas with Tamarind, Yoghurt, Curried Peas Crisps, Herbs and Veggies. More Likely Sweet, Tangy and Savory Taste. (Samosa Tarkari is Two Samosas Served with Pea Curry and Pickle on Side) (Veg, DF)

items.name: Thupka
items.description: Golden Delicious Veg or Non Veg Bone Broth with Vegetables, Spices, Herbs, Choice of Your Meat & Thin Soft Noodle . (Veg, DF)

items.name: Squid
items.description: Deep Fried Chickpea Battered Squid Tossed with Garlic, Fried Onion, Herbs and Chilly Pepper Seasoning. (GF)

items.description: Delicious Chips

items.name: Buff Sukuti
items.description: Here it is with each starting alphabet capitalized and the rest in lowercase:  Pan-Fried House Made Buffalo Jerky Tossed with Onion, Tomatoes, Cilantro and Light Spices, Served with Furandana (Crispy Flat Rice) and Side Potato and Vegetables Pickle. (GF)

items.name: Vhutan Set
items.description: Pan-Fried Goat's Tripe and Other Internal Organs with Shallot, Onions, Tomatoes, Garlic & Spices Served with Furandana and Mix Vegetables Pickle (GF)

items.name: Chicken Choila
items.description: Charred Chicken Thigh Fillet, Marinated with Garlic, Ginger, Lemon, Chilly and Spices Served with Flat Rice (Chiura) and Side Potato and Vegetables Pickle. (GF)

items.name: Sekuwa (Goat/ Pork)
items.description: Char Grilled Choice of Your Meat Skewers (Boneless), Marinated with Lemon, Ginger, Garlic and Light Spices, Served with Furandana and Side Potato and Vegetables Pickle (GF)

items.name: Newari Khaja Set
items.description: Newari Style Lunch Set Which Comes with Barra (Lentil Pancake), Egg, Pea Curry Soup, Flat Rice, Pickles, Chicken Choila and Fried Fish (GF). Ask for Veg Options
